_about: Stores removed from the warhammerdiscounts.com maps — e.g. confirmed not to sell Games Workshop / Warhammer models. Each store's full original record is retained here (plus a `removed` block noting why/when/from-where) for a future, more general hobby-store project. This file is NOT loaded by any map page and is intentionally kept outside data/ so it isn't bound to the Games Workshop store schema or scripts/validate-stores.js.

stores.name: Galaxy Games
stores.discount: Discount status unknown ? not yet researched. Call store to confirm their Warhammer discount policy.
stores.note: New listing — not on the official Warhammer Store Finder, found via independent web search. Described generically as a board/card/RPG game store; no explicit Warhammer mention found in any source checked (store has no standalone website, only a login-walled Facebook page that could not be verified). Call store to confirm Warhammer product and discount policy. Store email confirmation sent on 2026-06-27.

removed.reason: Confirmed via form submission that they do not sell Warhammer / Games Workshop models.
